name: Wisconsin
why_ruby_pro: Wisconsin DOR alcohol licensing compliance embedded in every distributor workflow
Excise tax calculations under Wisconsin Statutes Chapter 125 applied on every transaction
Price posting requirements enforced automatically so every filing is accurate and on time
problem: DOR reporting assembled by hand from disconnected spreadsheets and paper records
Wisconsin Chapter 125 excise tax calculations create error risk across thousands of invoices
Navigating municipality-level licensing rules across Wisconsin's 1,800+ local governments
difference: Auto-calculate Wisconsin excise on beer, wine, and spirits at the line-item level
DOR compliance reports generated directly from live sales and inventory data
Municipality rules enforced at the account level so every delivery stays compliant
how_it_works: Every order tagged with Chapter 125 excise rates and DOR license requirements automatically
One-click DOR compliance reports pulled from actual sales and inventory records
See account health and route profitability across all Wisconsin territories in real time
